projects.name: Sample Local Business Website
projects.description: A sample Figma-to-WordPress redesign workflow for a five-page business website.

notes.title: Project brief
notes.content: Goal: redesign an existing local business website and rebuild it in WordPress. Replace this sample context with the real client brief, sitemap, brand notes, and content status.

notes.title: Client handoff checklist
notes.content:
- Confirm all pages are approved
- Send staging link
- Record login handoff notes
- Confirm forms and analytics
- Schedule post-launch follow-up

tasks.title: Discovery and content audit
tasks.description: Collect goals, current website links, page list, brand assets, competitor references, and missing content.

tasks.title: Prepare discovery questions
tasks.description: Ask about audience, offer, pages, deadline, hosting, brand assets, and decision maker.

tasks.title: Audit current pages and assets
tasks.description: List pages, screenshots, content gaps, broken links, forms, and SEO basics.

tasks.title: Home page design in Figma
tasks.description: Design the home page first so the client can approve direction before inner pages.

tasks.title: Hero section inspiration
tasks.description: Collect three relevant hero examples and decide layout direction.

tasks.title: Home page mobile pass
tasks.description: Check spacing, section order, buttons, and sticky/header behavior on mobile.

tasks.title: Design inner page templates
tasks.description: Create reusable page patterns for About, Services, Contact, and a flexible content page.

tasks.title: Build approved design in WordPress
tasks.description: Set up staging, theme/builder structure, global styles, pages, forms, and responsive behavior.

tasks.title: Set up staging and global styles
tasks.description: Install WordPress, configure theme/builder, typography, colors, header, footer, and reusable sections.

tasks.title: Build pages and forms
tasks.description: Build Home, About, Services, Contact, and form confirmation states.

tasks.title: QA, launch, and handoff
tasks.description: Check responsive issues, forms, speed basics, redirects, backups, and client handoff notes.

tasks.title: Pre-launch QA checklist
tasks.description: Check mobile, forms, links, images, page titles, backups, SSL, analytics, and client approval.

tasks.title: Friday client update
tasks.description: Send progress summary, blockers, and next-week plan.

events.title: Discovery call
events.description: Use the discovery note and collect missing client assets.

events.title: Home page design review
events.description: Review the Figma home page direction with the client.

resources.title: Figma project file
resources.notes: Replace with the real Figma link.

resources.title: WordPress staging site
resources.notes: Replace with staging URL. Do not store passwords unless your setup is private and secure.

notes.title: Website discovery questions
notes.body:
# Website discovery questions

## Business
- What is the main offer?
- Who is the best-fit customer?
- What action should visitors take?

## Website
- Which pages are required?
- What content is ready?
- What content is missing?
- Are there competitor or inspiration links?

## Technical
- Where is the domain hosted?
- Where is WordPress hosted?
- Are forms, analytics, SEO, or redirects required?

## Approval
- Who gives final approval?
- What is the preferred review schedule?

notes.title: Pre-launch QA checklist
notes.body:
# Pre-launch QA checklist

- [ ] Mobile layout checked
- [ ] Tablet layout checked
- [ ] Desktop layout checked
- [ ] Forms tested
- [ ] Broken links checked
- [ ] Images optimized
- [ ] Page titles and meta descriptions reviewed
- [ ] SSL active
- [ ] Backups configured
- [ ] Client approved launch
